E0.0.note: all 9 injections detected + clean run silent; detector amendments A2

E0.1.note: 20/20 certified at alpha=0.1, 0 exceedances, pooled L-=0.031 L+=0.018; random gate fully vacuous (20/20 abort); oracle 0 exceed

E0.2p.outcome: K2-only: naive damage 0.27 vs 0.95 no-mine (huge, all levels); RC prevents damage at certified risk; K3 utility FAIL (probe at ceiling, RINCE~no-mine~RC); cert-random-k==RC (F15: hardness adds 0)

E1.0.outcome: ratio 14.3x at gamma=1 (>=3 required); gamma-decay 9.4/3.9/2.0 confirms P4 structure; figure figures/e1_0_premise.png

E1.1.outcome: oracle-null: true-label SupCon on activations does not beat vanilla field MSE (0.890 vs 0.837) -> bounds all of arm A; rc_hpm tie 0.838; postmortem documentation/postmortem-g2-eqm-bridge.md

E1.2.outcome: anm_cert calibrated (eps_ball=0.1, flip-risk certified) but recall-dist worse-in-noise (0.999 vs 0.801, margin 0.647); damage arm also in noise; inconclusive-negative

E1.3.outcome: entry condition unmet (no G2-passing arm) — formal skip per tree

D1.outcome: H-A fires (difficulty ladder) w/ H-B arm folded in; K3 was UNTESTABLE (headroom 0.025 < 0.030); EqM oracle-null STANDS (headroom 0.555 existed); cert-hard supply neutered (3-17% top decile, v-=0.03); no hidden sample-efficiency positive; RC fails visibly under corruption (3/3 abort); spectral probe artifact - redo

D2.knobsearch.outcome: rho_tail=0.05 UNREACHABLE (geometry); 9 candidates across {0.2,0.4,0.6}; gamma probe VALIDATED 3/4 (K_hat=19 at K=20) -> instrumented

D2.preflight.outcome: designated=None — NO rung passes both (a)H>2xfloor and (b)S>0.10. H and S ANTICORRELATED: high-H rungs have S=0, high-S rungs have H~0. PI 'tension by construction' confirmed. Running linchpin (S-vs-alpha) + band-ends damage ladder before declaring B2.

D2.linchpin.outcome: OVERTURNS premature B2: supply THRESHOLD-limited not structural. High-H rungs S=0@a0.10 but S=0.4-0.92 @a0.20-0.40. H-S anticorr was a supply-measured-at-tight-alpha artifact. Band testable. Dev D5.

D2.safety.outcome: B3 does NOT fire: H-B' retention 0.951 (certify-neg-only keeps 95% protection, positives not load-bearing). FP-pull harm real-but-minor (0.033 vs FN 0.395). RINCE foil DEAD (no separation). Dev D3.

D2.utility_band.outcome: B1 FALSE (gaps robustly NEGATIVE -6 to -24pts at alpha=0.40). F15 decomp DECISIVE: rc_hpm HARMS but cert_random_k ~= no_mine -> HARDNESS harms, certification safe. Hardness-mining concentrates on residual-FN tail (E1.0 14.3x tension). No winning alpha. SupCon headroom 0.04-0.06 unexploited. Branch B2: RC-HPM utility retired; redirect = certified-curriculum-no-hardness.

D2.gamma.outcome: kNN-Laplacian probe VALIDATED 3/4 known-K; D1-#8 artifact resolved

RC-ANM.ladder.outcome: aggressive damages (premise OK); RC-ANM damaged despite cert (flip-basin degenerate on weak 1000-step teacher, certified eps=1.2, accepted 80%); oracle_safe ~= vanilla + best coverage BUT dose-confound check running; fixed_anm damages toy (v10 helps IN-1K -> toy wrong instrument for ANM utility).

D3.contrastive_archive.outcome: C2 MIDDLE: cert_random_k = cheap safe regularizer (+0.01-0.02 over no_mine, all 5 rungs); curriculum/conf_easy/mid_band underperform (no signal); utility+mechanism gates FAIL. Contrastive path fully closed.

RC-ANM.v2_proxy_validation.outcome: FAIL (bal acc 0.49@1000, 0.53@2500). Toy teacher field collapsed -> basin proxy ~chance vs analytic oracle. Concept real (dose-check) but NOT CPU-instrumentable. R2': escalate to CIFAR (richer teacher).

active_runs.description: RC-ANM Step-1 premise probe: ANM endpoint mining on v10 EqM-B/2 ckpt, safety scores + gradient impact, gates S1-premise/impact -> P1/P2/P3

needs_user_input.prompt: RC-ANM pivot CPU-complete. Concept VALIDATED (oracle-safe beats dose-matched random: 0.877 vs 1.285) + premise VALIDATED (aggressive damages), but R2': the basin-safety functional is NOT instrumentable by a teacher proxy at 2D toy scale (collapsed field, proxy~chance vs oracle). Pre-registered next = CIFAR mini RC-ANM (vanilla / v10 fixed-ANM / RC-ANM with rn18-or-EqM-EMA teacher) where basin/field signals are rich. CIFAR/GPU needs your approval (FID never auto). Decide: (a) approve CIFAR-mini RC-ANM, (b) more CPU proxy work (note: prereg forbids fishing; would need a new functional hypothesis), (c) write up RC-ANM concept+toy as-is. See documentation/postmortem-rcanm-r4.md + pivot-rc-anm.md.

notes: 2026-06-12: Amendment A1 (pre-run): m=250, alpha_0=0.10 primary; see deviations.md D1
2026-06-12: monitor/symmetry checker moved to batch-mean units (pair scores within-batch dependent); found during clean-run smoke, before any gate
2026-06-12: G1 K2-only -> paper framing narrows to harm-bounding+guarantee; gains claim killed at toy scale per criterion (e)

2026-06-12: CPU portion of decision tree COMPLETE. Machinery validated (G-1, G0); harm-bounding story (G1); premise holds on CIFAR (G1.5, 14.3x); EqM bridge dead at toy scale (G2 oracle-null); E1.3 skipped. Stage 2 (GPU) NOT entered — would need new evidence per tree + human approval.
mainline: RC-ANM (Risk-Controlled Adversarial Negative Mining for EqM)
archived: contrastive-EqM (arm A, D1/D2/D3) = negative result; see documentation/pivot-rc-anm.md
